meta.title: Beatra — The Best Free Discord Music Bot
meta.description: Add Beatra to your Discord server for high-quality music streaming, 24/7 uptime and zero cost. Simple, reliable, open source.

hero.title: A Discord bot that just works
hero.subtitle: Beatra brings high-quality music streaming to your server with 24/7 uptime, simple commands and zero setup cost.

features.title: Built for every server, from day one
features.subtitle: From small friend groups to communities with thousands of members, Beatra scales with you.

items.title: Always online
items.description: 24/7 uptime backed by monitored infrastructure, so your server never goes quiet.

items.title: Fine-tuned control
items.description: Fast, customizable settings tailored to your server, so Beatra behaves exactly the way you want.

items.title: Open & secure
items.description: Beatra is open source. Browse the code, audit it yourself, or contribute directly on GitHub.

items.title: Always-on support
items.description: A responsive team behind our support server, ready to help whenever you need it.

cta.title: Ready to level up your server?
cta.subtitle: Add Beatra in seconds and start streaming the best sound quality Discord has to offer.

footer.description: The best free Discord music bot. High-quality audio with 24/7 uptime, completely free.

commands.title: Bot Commands
commands.subtitle: Every slash command Beatra supports, ready to use in your server.

partners.title: Partners
partners.subtitle: The teams and communities we're proud to work with.
partners.codeshare: An ideal platform for developers to share their projects, connect with other developers, and sell their work across many categories and languages.
partners.productsSubtitle: Other products built and maintained by the Codeshare team.

sections.heading: What we collect
items: Discord User ID — for authentication and permissions
Discord Server ID — to track where the bot is installed
Music playback history — song titles, URLs, and who requested them
Voice channel connection data — required for playback
Playlist data — your custom playlists
Queue information — current and upcoming songs
sections.note: Not collected: passwords, payment details, private messages, or voice recordings.

sections.heading: How we use data
items: Core music playback and queue management
Role-based permissions and access control
Playlist and preference storage
Premium entitlement delivery
Service quality monitoring and abuse prevention
sections.note: We do not sell your data or use it for ad profiling.

sections.heading: Security
items: Database encrypted at rest and in transit
Scoped session handling with automatic expiry
Least-privilege access control and auditing
Regional redundancy with disaster recovery

sections.heading: Compliance
sections.text: We align with GDPR, UK GDPR, CCPA/CPRA, LGPD, PIPEDA, KVKK, APPI, PDPA and POPIA.

sections.heading: Your rights
sections.text: You can access, correct, or delete your data at any time by contacting us through our support server.

sections.heading: Acceptance
sections.text: Using Beatra means you agree to these terms. Continued use after updates counts as acceptance.

sections.heading: Service
sections.text: Beatra provides Discord music bot and web dashboard services: music playback from YouTube, Spotify, SoundCloud and more, playlist management, queue control, a web dashboard, audio effects, premium features, and support for 21 languages.

sections.heading: User responsibilities
items: Follow Discord's Terms of Service and your server's rules
Use only lawful and properly authorized content
Do not abuse, spam, or disrupt the service
Do not reverse engineer or attempt unauthorized access
Respect other users and moderation decisions

sections.heading: Availability
sections.text: Beatra is provided "as is". Availability may vary due to infrastructure, third-party platforms, or maintenance.

sections.heading: Prohibited
items: Copyright or intellectual property violations in played content
Attacking or overloading the service
Unauthorized redistribution of our code
Harassment or malicious activity
Circumventing billing or security controls

sections.heading: Premium
sections.text: Premium is available for $1.49/month. Refunds follow our refund policy.

notFound.message: This page doesn't exist. Let's get you back on track.

howItWorks.title: Music in your server in three steps
howItWorks.subtitle: No panel setup, no complicated roles, no waiting. Invite Beatra and start playing from Discord commands instantly.

steps.title: Invite Beatra
steps.description: Add the bot to your Discord server with the permissions it needs for music playback.

steps.title: Join a voice channel
steps.description: Pick the channel where your community hangs out and let Beatra connect there.

steps.title: Play anything
steps.description: Use /play with a song name or link from YouTube, Spotify, SoundCloud and more.

homePremium.title: More room for serious music servers
homePremium.subtitle: Premium removes voting friction and expands the limits for queues, playlists, effects and always-on listening.

highlights.title: 24/7 music
highlights.description: Keep Beatra connected and playing even when the channel becomes empty.

highlights.title: Bigger queues
highlights.description: Scale from 100 free queue tracks up to thousands of tracks on premium tiers.

highlights.title: More control
highlights.description: Unlock higher volume, unlimited effects, speed control and no vote walls.

experience.title: Built around the way Discord communities listen
experience.subtitle: Beatra is more than a play command: it gives your server tools for discovery, control and shared listening.

items.title: Multi-source playback
items.description: Search or paste links from popular music platforms and keep the queue moving.

items.title: Community playlists
items.description: Create, save and share playlists that your server can come back to anytime.

items.title: Dashboard controls
items.description: Manage queue, volume, language and server settings from the web dashboard.

premium.title: Unlock unlimited power
premium.subtitle: Choose the right Beatra plan for yourself, your whole server, or a fully branded custom bot.
premium.comparisonTitle: Premium features made for active servers
premium.comparisonSubtitle: The paid tiers expand the limits that matter most when people listen together every day.

plans.name: Premium
features: No ads and no voting required

plans.name: Premium Plus
plans.description: For listeners who want doubled personal limits.
features: No ads and no voting required

highlights.title: 24/7 mode
highlights.description: Beatra can stay in your voice channel and keep music running around the clock.

highlights.title: Huge queues
highlights.description: Premium servers can build long sessions without constantly clearing space.

highlights.title: Advanced audio
highlights.description: Use higher volume limits, effects, filters and speed control with fewer restrictions.

highlights.title: No vote walls
highlights.description: Premium removes voting friction so your server can focus on listening.

faq.question: Is free Beatra still available?
faq.answer: Yes. The free tier still includes core playback, queues, playlists and basic controls.

faq.question: Which plan should I choose?
faq.answer: Premium is enough for most servers. Premium Plus is better when you need doubled queue, playlist and volume limits.

faq.question: Where do I buy it?
faq.answer: Use the Premium button and complete the purchase through the official Beatra flow.

faq.question: Can I get support?
faq.answer: Yes. Join the support server for billing, entitlement and setup help.
